{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Free Worlds Subline
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Free Worlds Subline]] is a platform where controversy regarding [[Undermaker]]'s reputation occurs.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c44">''The Engineer'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
